meaning: n.(<<圣经·创世记>>中)拉班(Leah和Rachel之父)
examples: Then Laban said to Jacob, "What have you done?"
Laban Talam, a 30-year-old villager, has a smile on his face.
Modern German dance, as heralded by Laban and Wigman, has veered towards self-expression and subjectivity.
Vincent Laban pulled one back for the visitors but Wales held on in the face of some heavy second half pressure after Andy King was sent off.
